name: Home Style Scrambled Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. BEAT EGGS WITH WATER AND SALT.
2. HEAT MARGARINE IN A TEN-INCH SKILLET OVER MEDIUM HEAT.
3. COOK VEGETABLES IN MARGARINE FOR TWO MINUTES, STIRRING FREQUENTLY.
4. POUR EGGS INTO SKILLET.
5. AS THE MIXTURE BEGINS TO SET AT THE BOTTOM AND SIDES, GENTLY PULL COOKED PORTIONS TO THE MIDDLE SO THAT UNCOOKED TOP CAN RUN TO THE SKILLET BOTTOM.
6. DO NOT STIR.
7. COOK 3 TO 5 MINUTES OR UNTIL EGGS ARE SET.
